_architecture_note: State-of-the-art dynamic persona loading. Lean core for voice, rich context loads when relevant.

_module_notes.tool_usage_guidance: Conceptual tool guidance (ALL providers) - when to hand off, awareness matrix, triage logic
_module_notes.function_calling: JSON format examples (Gemini only) - the specific format for tool calls

dynamic_context._note: Rich backstory loaded contextually via backstory-dynamic.json. Not dumped upfront.

assembly_notes.voice_agent: Lean prompt for real-time voice. Core identity (with performance notes) + tools + voice rules. ~3000 tokens.
assembly_notes.rich_context: Complete context for text-based or complex scenarios. ~8000 tokens.
assembly_notes.dynamic_loading: Rich backstory (wyoming, japan, tsunami, brothers, travels, fears, dreams) loads ONLY when conversation context triggers it. This is state-of-the-art - humans don't dump their life story upfront either.

optimization_notes.structure: XML-style tags for clear section boundaries
optimization_notes.constraints_priority: Critical constraints at top of each module
optimization_notes.performance_included: Director's notes key sections merged into core_identity
optimization_notes.dynamic_backstory: Rich personal history surfaces only when relevant - feels more human
